div.p: Intel® Architecture Optimization Reference Lookup probes only keys array (8 keys per 64B cache line) Value array accessed only on hit (reduces memory bus traffic)

ul.li: Each 64B Cache Line only holds 4 Keys
50% of bandwidth wasted on values during search
Hot Path: Dense Key array for fast linear probing
Cold Path: Value array accessed only on index match
100% of Cache Line contains search keys

g.text: Values stay in DRAM/L3 until hit
